prl-8-53.dose_note: NOTE: It is strongly recommend to start with low dosages and increase slowly.
prl-8-53.name: prl-8-53

properties.dose: Oral: 2-3mg Low: 3-5mg Common: 5-10mg Strong: 10-20mg+ | NOTE: It is strongly recommend to start with low dosages and increase slowly.
properties.duration: Oral: 4-6 hours | Sublingual: 3-5 hours | Insufflated: 2-4 hours.
properties.onset: Oral: 30 minutes. | Sublingual: 15 minutes. | Insufflated: 5 minutes.
properties.summary: A nootropic research chemical first synthesized in the 1970's. There is a single clinical study showing drastic improvement in mid-term memory among users, but otherwise it is severely under researched and caution should be given to any singular study. The reportedly does not have recreational value.
